g.onclick: sendPrompt('What HTTP endpoints are available in JobMarketplace.API?')
sendPrompt('Explain the middleware execution order in Program.cs')
sendPrompt('How does JWT role-based authorization work on the controllers?')
sendPrompt('Show me the JobsController methods and their routes')
sendPrompt('How does MediatR dispatch commands and queries?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the LoggingBehavior and ValidationBehavior')
sendPrompt('Show me an example command handler like CreateJobCommandHandler')
sendPrompt('How do repositories use EF Core in the Infrastructure layer?')
sendPrompt('How does DapperQueryService stream stored procedure results?')
sendPrompt('What does the SQL Server schema look like for JobMarketplaceDB?')
